user_prompt: Consecrate the assault cannon before charging
prayer:
Approach the assault cannon with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's wrathful charge.
Anoint its sacred barrels and coils with blessed promethium oil before charging commences.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the assault cannon to awaken and embrace the surging plasma flux.
Initiate the charging rite whilst reciting the Litany of Overcharge, ensuring harmonious fury.
Verify the assault cannon's capacitors brim with sanctified energy, ready for the Emperor's judgment.

user_prompt: Prepare the assault cannon for repair
prayer:
Kneel before the wounded assault cannon, murmuring the Canticle of Restoration.
Diagnose its fractured mechanisms with auspex-probes sanctified by the Omnissiah.
Anoint each damaged servo and barrel of the assault cannon with mechadendrite-lubricants during repair.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's resilience as you realign and weld its holy components.
Conclude the repair with a hymn of renewal, affirming the assault cannon's battle-readiness.

user_prompt: Sanctify the icarus array during activation
prayer:
Present the icarus array to the heavens, beseeching the Omnissiah's aerial vigilance.
Purify its auspex lenses and targeting servos with incense of sacred circuits.
Chant the Activation Doxology whilst engaging the icarus array's primary relays.
Commune with the Machine Spirit of the icarus array, guiding its sensors to pierce the void.
Sanctify the activation fully, ensuring the icarus array hunts with unerring precision.

In dire exigency, grasp the data-arc and intone the Emergency Benediction of the Omnissiah.
Purge corrupted noospheric tendrils from the data-arc with electro-sanctifiers.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's fortitude to enact the emergency procedure amid chaos.
Stabilize the data-arc's flux capacitors through hasty litanies of coherence.
Seal the rite with a vow of resilience, restoring the data-arc's vital transmissions.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for augmetic limb a loading
prayer:
Revere the augmetic limb, offering it to the Machine God's forge-blessing.
Anoint its myo-fibre bundles and neural relays before loading munitions commence.
Beseech the indwelling Machine Spirit of the augmetic limb to accept the payload.
Initiate the loading sequence with precision incantations, chambering rounds in sanctity.
Affirm the augmetic limb's augmented might, synchronized for the Omnissiah's crusade.

user_prompt: Consecrate the heat sink before emergency procedure
prayer:

Scour its vanes with ablative sacred oils prior to the emergency procedure.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the heat sink to dissipate the Omnissiah's fiery wrath.
Engage coolant daemons and litanies to avert meltdown during the emergency procedure.
Consecrate the heat sink's renewal, ensuring thermal equilibrium for the greater machine.

user_prompt: Consecrate the cenobyte servitor before purification
prayer:
Gather around the cenobyte servitor, intoning the Purification Canticle of the Omnissiah.
Anoint its cranial vaults and servo-limbs with noospheric purifiers.
Exorcise digital corruptions from the cenobyte servitor's cogitator core.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to emerge pristine through the purification rite.
Seal the cenobyte servitor in blessed stasis, ready to serve the Cult Mechanicus eternally.

user_prompt: Assist with mass-drive regulator a calibration
prayer:
Align the mass-drive regulator upon the calibration altar, murmuring binary hymns.
Probe its gyro-stabilizers with sanctified mechadendrites for precise calibration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the mass-drive regulator to harmonize inertial flows.
Recite the Canticle of Equilibrium whilst adjusting its quantum servos.
Verify the mass-drive regulator's flawless calibration, ensuring void-piercing accuracy.

user_prompt: Urgent energy core a synchronization needed
prayer:
In urgent haste, encircle the energy core and beseech the Omnissiah's synchronizing light.

Awaken the core Machine Spirit to pulse in perfect unity during synchronization.
